salientSummary: GraphRowContent composes graph column + pills + subject + author + live relative-age; RefPill renders local/remote/HEAD (tags filtered); GraphRowRefs.enrich joins ForEachRefParser output into [LayoutRow] with synthetic .head prepend when currentBranch matches. 8 md5-distinct snapshots + 16 unit tests green. VAL-GRAPH-001 and VAL-GRAPH-007 fulfilled.
whatWasImplemented: Added Sources/Git/Layout/GraphRowRefs.swift (pure enrich function: filters tags, prepends .head for current branch, no-op on empty map). Added Sources/Views/Graph/RelativeAgeFormatter.swift (compact breakpoints: just now / Nm / Nh / Nd / Nw / Nmo / Ny, with future-date clamp to just now). Added Sources/Views/Graph/RefPill.swift (Capsule-based pill: accent-filled local, secondary-filled remote, outlined HEAD; tag renders as EmptyView). Added Sources/Views/Graph/GraphRowContent.swift (pure inner view composing GraphCell + pill cluster with +N overflow at 3 + subject flex/tail-truncate + 140pt author + 64pt TimelineView age label, plus selection background). Added Tests/KiteTests/GraphLayoutTests/GraphRowRefsTests.swift (7 @Test covering populate, skip-tags, head-prepend, no-head-on-mismatch, detached case, empty-map shortcut, field preservation). Added Tests/KiteTests/ViewTests/GraphRowContentUnitTests.swift (9 @Test covering every RelativeAgeFormatter breakpoint plus a tag-drop smoke test). Added Tests/KiteTests/ViewTests/GraphRowContentSnapshotTests.swift (8 snapshot cases: single row, single local pill, local+remote, overflow +2, HEAD pill trio, long-subject truncate, selected background, dark-mode parity of local+remote). Commits stamped at Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 0) so TimelineView-driven age labels are deterministic across runs. Snapshot refs recorded under Tests/KiteTests/ViewTests/__Snapshots__/GraphRowContentSnapshotTests/ — 8 PNGs all with distinct md5.
whatWasLeftUndone: Wiring GraphRowContent into the scroll container (M4-graph-scroll-container) and calling GraphRowRefs.enrich with live ForEachRefParser output (also M4-graph-scroll-container). Tag pills are intentionally out of scope per mission §3.

commandsRun.observation: project regenerated with new sources and tests
Test run with 154 Swift Testing tests in 23 suites passed; XCTest block Executed 26 tests with 0 failures — total 180 (was 156 baseline, +24 from this feature)
8 — every case md5-distinct, no degenerate false-greens

interactiveChecks.action: Did not launch the app; the row is a pure inner view with no wired callsite yet (that's M4-graph-scroll-container). Snapshot + unit tests fully exercise the presentation. Manual fixture-repo check deferred to the scroll container feature when GraphRowContent has a real caller.
interactiveChecks.observed: N/A — pure view path fully covered by snapshot + unit suites

discoveredIssues.description: Ownership crossover: `Sources/Git/Layout/GraphRowRefs.swift` and `Tests/KiteTests/GraphLayoutTests/GraphRowRefsTests.swift` live in paths INTERFACES.md §3 assigns to git-engine-worker, but the feature brief for M4-graph-row-meta explicitly lists them under this swiftui-worker's ownership. Followed the feature brief. Future git-engine-worker touches to Sources/Git/Layout/ should be aware this file lives there.

TimelineView(.periodic(from: .now, by: 60)) means age labels re-render each minute in production and at arbitrary instants in tests. Snapshot determinism is achieved by stamping fixture commits at Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 0) so every case resolves to a large-year bucket (5y+ from now, stable for decades). If the suite ever moves to hermetic clock injection, passing a fixed `now` to the TimelineView context would let the fixtures use fresher timestamps — not needed today.
